scripts.dev: pnpm clean:ports:cloud && export CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=${CARGO_BUILD_JOBS:-$(( ( $(sysctl -n hw.ncpu 2>/dev/null || nproc 2>/dev/null || echo 4) + 1 ) / 2 ))} && cargo build -p mhaol-backend --bin mhaol-cloud && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names cloud,web,tauri --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta "pnpm run app:cloud:bin" "pnpm run app:cloud:web" "pnpm run app:tauri:cloud"
scripts.dev:headless: pnpm clean:ports:cloud && export CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=${CARGO_BUILD_JOBS:-$(( ( $(sysctl -n hw.ncpu 2>/dev/null || nproc 2>/dev/null || echo 4) + 1 ) / 2 ))} && cargo build -p mhaol-headless --bin mhaol-headless && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names headless,web --prefix-colors blue,green "pnpm run app:headless:bin" "pnpm run app:cloud:web"
scripts.build:cloud: pnpm --filter frontend build && cargo build --release --bin mhaol-cloud
scripts.build:dist: pnpm run build:cloud && cd apps/cloud && cargo tauri build
scripts.build:headless: pnpm --filter frontend build && cargo build --release --bin mhaol-headless
scripts.build:headless:linux: pnpm --filter frontend build && cargo build --release --bin mhaol-headless
scripts.check: pnpm -r run check && cargo check -p mhaol-backend && cargo check -p mhaol-headless && cargo check -p mhaol-android-tv && cargo check -p mhaol-android-mobile
scripts.clean:ports:cloud: for p in 9898 9899 9900 9901; do lsof -ti:$p 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; pgrep -f 'mhaol-cloud worker' 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.clean:ports: for p in 9898 9899 9900 9901; do lsof -ti:$p 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; pgrep -f 'mhaol-cloud worker' 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.clean: pkill -9 -x mhaol-cloud-shell 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -x mhaol-cloud 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -x mhaol-headless 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -x mhaol-android-tv 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -x mhaol-android-mobile 2>/dev/null; pnpm clean:ports; pnpm -r run clean && cargo clean && rm -f mhaol.db mhaol.db-wal mhaol.db-shm
scripts.app:cloud: mkdir -p logs && set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=9899 cargo run -p mhaol-backend --bin mhaol-cloud 2>&1 | tee logs/cloud.log
scripts.app:cloud:bin: mkdir -p logs && set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=9899 ./target/debug/mhaol-cloud 2>&1 | tee logs/cloud.log
scripts.app:cloud:web: mkdir -p logs && pnpm --filter frontend dev 2>&1 | tee logs/web.log
scripts.app:headless: mkdir -p logs && set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=9899 cargo run -p mhaol-headless --bin mhaol-headless 2>&1 | tee logs/headless.log
scripts.app:headless:bin: mkdir -p logs && set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=9899 ./target/debug/mhaol-headless 2>&1 | tee logs/headless.log
scripts.app:tauri:cloud: mkdir -p logs && cd apps/cloud && cargo tauri dev 2>&1 | tee ../../logs/tauri.log
scripts.app:tauri:android:mobile: mkdir -p logs && cd apps/android-mobile && cargo tauri android dev Medium_Phone_API_36.1 --host 2>&1 | tee ../../logs/android-mobile.log
scripts.app:tauri:android:mobile:build: cd apps/android-mobile && cargo tauri android build
scripts.app:tauri:android:tv: mkdir -p logs && cd apps/android-tv && cargo tauri android dev Google_TV_1080p_API_36 --host 2>&1 | tee ../../logs/android-tv.log
scripts.app:tauri:android:tv:build: cd apps/android-tv && cargo tauri android build
